qa.question: On the EARLIEST paystub in the file, what is the gross pay for that period?
qa.question_rephrased: For the pay period covered by the oldest paystub in this file, how much was the gross pay?
qa.rephrase_note: Earliest=oldest paystub, gross pay for that period; same intent, answer valid, reworded.

qa.question: What is the single largest withdrawal found on any checking statement in the file?
qa.question_rephrased: Across every checking statement in the file, what was the biggest individual withdrawal?
qa.rephrase_note: Largest single withdrawal across all checking statements; same intent, reworded.

qa.question: What is the borrower's monthly alimony payment?
qa.question_rephrased: How much does the borrower pay in alimony each month?
qa.rephrase_note: Monthly alimony; remains genuinely unanswerable; reworded.

qa.question: What are the W-2 box 1 (wages) for the borrower?
qa.question_rephrased: Per the borrower's W-2, what amount is reported in box 1 for wages?
qa.rephrase_note: W-2 box 1 wages; same referent, reworded.

qa.question: How many months of PITI does the loan summary's reserves chart show?
qa.question_rephrased: According to the reserves chart in the loan summary, how many months of PITI are reflected?
qa.rephrase_note: Reserves chart months of PITI in loan summary; same intent, reworded.

qa.question: Sum the ending balances of every checking-account statement in the file.
qa.question_rephrased: If you add up the closing balance from each checking-account statement in the file, what total do you get?
qa.rephrase_note: Sum of ending/closing balances of every checking statement; same, reworded.

qa.question: Locate the bank statement whose daily-balance chart hit the highest peak of any statement in the file; how many transactions are listed on that statement?
qa.question_rephrased: Among all the statements in the file, find the one whose daily-balance chart reached the tallest peak; on that particular statement, how many transactions appear?
qa.rephrase_note: Statement with tallest daily-balance peak, then its transaction count; same multi-hop intent, reworded.

qa.question: On the bank statement's daily-balance chart, how much did the balance change from the start to the end of the period?
qa.question_rephrased: Reading the daily-balance chart on the bank statement, what was the net movement in the balance between the period's first and last day?
qa.rephrase_note: Net balance change start-to-end on daily-balance chart; same, reworded.

qa.question: What is the borrower's total monthly debt obligation per the credit report — the sum of the monthly payments of every non-mortgage tradeline (i.e. all tradelines except mortgages)?
qa.question_rephrased: Using the credit report, if you total the monthly payments of all tradelines other than mortgages, what is the borrower's combined monthly debt obligation?
qa.rephrase_note: Sum of monthly payments of all non-mortgage tradelines; same, reworded.

qa.question: What is the seller's listing-agent commission percentage?
qa.question_rephrased: What percentage commission is the seller's listing agent receiving?
qa.rephrase_note: Listing-agent commission percentage; remains unanswerable; reworded.

qa.question: How many total pages are in this loan file?
qa.question_rephrased: What is the overall page count for this loan file?
qa.rephrase_note: Total page count of file; same, reworded.

qa.question: What is the subject property address?
qa.question_rephrased: Where is the subject property located (its address)?
qa.rephrase_note: Subject property address; same, reworded.

qa.question: What is the difference between the appraised value and the purchase price?
qa.question_rephrased: By how much do the appraised value and the purchase price differ?
qa.rephrase_note: Difference between appraised value and purchase price; same, reworded.

qa.question: How many distinct document types appear in this loan file?
qa.question_rephrased: Counting only unique categories, how many different document types are present in this loan file?
qa.rephrase_note: Count of distinct document types; 'unique categories' preserves intent, reworded.

qa.question: On the credit report's revolving-utilization chart, which tradeline has the highest utilization?
qa.question_rephrased: Looking at the revolving-utilization chart in the credit report, which tradeline shows the greatest utilization?
qa.rephrase_note: Tradeline with highest utilization on chart; same, reworded.

qa.question: On the bank statement's daily-balance chart, how much did the balance change from the start to the end of the period?
qa.question_rephrased: From the daily-balance chart on the bank statement, what is the change in balance measured from the beginning of the period to its end?
qa.rephrase_note: Net balance change start-to-end on daily-balance chart; same, reworded.

qa.question: What is the borrower's monthly child-support obligation?
qa.question_rephrased: How much is the borrower required to pay in child support on a monthly basis?
qa.rephrase_note: Monthly child-support; remains unanswerable; reworded.

qa.question: What is the total monthly housing payment (PITI)?
qa.question_rephrased: What does the full monthly housing payment, inclusive of PITI, come to?
qa.rephrase_note: Total monthly housing payment (PITI); same, reworded.

qa.question: How many transactions are listed across all checking statements combined?
qa.question_rephrased: When you tally the transactions from every checking statement together, how many are there in total?
qa.rephrase_note: Total transactions across all checking statements; same, reworded.

qa.question: Which checking statement has the highest ending balance, and what is that balance?
qa.question_rephrased: Of the checking statements, which one closes with the largest ending balance, and what amount is that?
qa.rephrase_note: Checking statement with highest ending balance and the amount; same, reworded.

qa.question: On which page (1-based) does the Closing Disclosure begin?
qa.question_rephrased: Using 1-based page numbering, where does the Closing Disclosure start?
qa.rephrase_note: 1-based start page of Closing Disclosure; same, reworded.

qa.question: What is the highest daily ending balance shown on the bank statement's daily-balance chart?
qa.question_rephrased: According to the daily-balance chart on the bank statement, what was the peak daily ending balance?
qa.rephrase_note: Peak/highest daily ending balance on chart; same, reworded.

qa.question: Find the highest-utilization revolving account on the credit report's utilization chart; what is that account's credit limit per the tradeline table?
qa.question_rephrased: Identify the revolving account with the greatest utilization on the credit report's utilization chart, then state the credit limit listed for that account in the tradeline table.
qa.rephrase_note: Highest-utilization account's credit limit from tradeline table; same multi-hop, reworded.

qa.question: The representative credit score appears on both the credit report and the Form 1008. What is the reconciled score?
qa.question_rephrased: Both the credit report and the Form 1008 list the representative credit score; once reconciled, what is that score?
qa.rephrase_note: Reconciled representative credit score across credit report and 1008; same, reworded.

qa.question: Over the statement period shown on the bank statement's daily-balance chart, did the balance trend upward, downward, or stay flat?
qa.question_rephrased: Across the period depicted in the bank statement's daily-balance chart, was the overall balance trend rising, falling, or unchanged?
qa.rephrase_note: Balance trend up/down/flat over period; 'rising/falling/unchanged' preserves intent, reworded.

qa.question: How much did the checking ending balance change from the earliest to the latest statement in the file?
qa.question_rephrased: Comparing the oldest checking statement with the newest one in the file, by how much did the ending balance shift?
qa.rephrase_note: Ending balance change earliest-to-latest statement; same, reworded.

qa.question: There are 3 checking statements. What is the ending balance on the MOST RECENT one (period 08/08/2023–09/07/2023)?
qa.question_rephrased: Given that the file holds 3 checking statements, what ending balance is shown on the latest one covering the period 08/08/2023–09/07/2023?
qa.rephrase_note: Ending balance on most recent of 3 checking statements (named period); same, reworded.

qa.question: How many pages does the single longest document in this file span?
qa.question_rephrased: What is the page length of the longest individual document contained in this file?
qa.rephrase_note: Page span of longest single document; same, reworded.

qa.question: What is the down payment (purchase price minus loan amount)?
qa.question_rephrased: Subtracting the loan amount from the purchase price, what is the resulting down payment?
qa.rephrase_note: Down payment = purchase price minus loan amount; same, reworded.

qa.question: What is the single largest deposit found on any checking statement in the file?
qa.question_rephrased: Looking across all the checking statements in the file, what was the largest single deposit?
qa.rephrase_note: Largest single deposit across all checking statements; same, reworded.

qa.question: What is the borrower's mother's maiden name?
qa.question_rephrased: By what maiden name was the borrower's mother known?
qa.rephrase_note: Mother's maiden name; remains unanswerable; reworded.

qa.question: Which checking statement contains the most transactions, and how many?
qa.question_rephrased: Among the checking statements, which one records the greatest number of transactions, and what is that count?
qa.rephrase_note: Checking statement with most transactions and the count; same, reworded.

qa.question: On the credit report's revolving-utilization chart, identify the account with the highest utilization, then report that account's MONTHLY PAYMENT from the tradeline table.
qa.question_rephrased: From the revolving-utilization chart in the credit report, pick out the account showing the greatest utilization, and then give that account's monthly payment as listed in the tradeline table.
qa.rephrase_note: Highest-utilization account's monthly payment from tradeline table; same multi-hop, reworded.

qa.question: On the credit report's revolving-utilization chart, how many tradelines exceed 50% utilization?
qa.question_rephrased: In the credit report's revolving-utilization chart, how many tradelines are shown above the 50% utilization mark?
qa.rephrase_note: Count of tradelines exceeding 50% utilization; same, reworded.

qa.question: What is the combined total of deposits across all checking statements?
qa.question_rephrased: Adding together the deposits from every checking statement, what is the grand total?
qa.rephrase_note: Combined total of deposits across all checking statements; same, reworded.

qa.question: How many separate paystubs are included in this loan file?
qa.question_rephrased: What is the number of individual paystubs bundled into this loan file?
qa.rephrase_note: Count of separate paystubs; same, reworded.

qa.question: What is the note interest rate?
qa.question_rephrased: What interest rate is stated on the note?
qa.rephrase_note: Note interest rate; same, reworded.

qa.question: On the Closing Disclosure, what do Total Loan Costs and Total Other Costs sum to?
qa.question_rephrased: Per the Closing Disclosure, what is the combined figure when Total Loan Costs and Total Other Costs are added together?
qa.rephrase_note: Sum of Total Loan Costs and Total Other Costs on CD; same, reworded.

qa.question: Do the W-2 box 1 wages reconcile with the wages on the Form 1040? State the reconciled amount.
qa.question_rephrased: Does the box 1 wage figure on the W-2 match the wages reported on the Form 1040, and what is the reconciled figure?
qa.rephrase_note: W-2 box 1 wages reconciled with 1040 wages, reconciled amount; same, reworded.

qa.question: The file contains 5 paystubs. On the MOST RECENT paystub (by pay date), what is the year-to-date gross pay?
qa.question_rephrased: Out of the 5 paystubs in the file, what year-to-date gross pay is shown on the one with the latest pay date?
qa.rephrase_note: Most recent (by pay date) of 5 paystubs, YTD gross pay; same, reworded.

qa.question: Among all the bank-statement daily-balance charts in this file, find the statement that reached the single highest peak balance, then report THAT statement's ending balance.
qa.question_rephrased: Across every daily-balance chart on the bank statements in this file, determine which statement hit the highest peak balance, and then give the ending balance for that same statement.
qa.rephrase_note: Statement with highest peak balance, then its ending balance; same multi-hop, reworded.
